title: cerastium decalvans var. histrio
intro: Cerastium decalvans var. histrio, also known as a type of toadflax or snow-in-summer, is a flowering plant belonging to the carnation family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Cerastium decalvans var. histrio can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the intended application.
